---
title: "Module 4: Expanding beyond the PCA"
format: html
---

While PCA is widely used, it may not always capture complex structure in high-dimensional data. Other methods, frequently using non-linear modeling, can highlight different aspects of the data.

**What you’ll explore:**

- How PCA compares to methods like UMAP and t-SNE  
- The difference between global and local structure  
- How different methods represent patterns in the data  
- When different dimensionality reduction approaches are useful  

The full content for this module will be released on the morning of the workshop!
